description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a slatted top and a matching slatted lower shelf, supported by four sturdy square legs. The wood has a rich, medium-brown stain with visible grain and a slightly weathered finish, suggesting durability for outdoor or urban use. The slatted design allows for airflow and drainage, making it suitable for environments exposed to the elements. The lower shelf provides additional storage or display space, echoing the design of the tabletop. The construction appears robust, with thick planks and solid joinery, giving the table a rustic yet functional appearance. There are no visible decorative carvings or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian and practical style.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden table with slatted top and lower shelf, finished in a medium-brown stain. Its robust, rustic design is ideal for outdoor or urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slatted tabletop and lower shelf, with all four legs visible and open gaps between the slats.
description_view_1: Side view with the slatted tabletop and shelf appearing as solid surfaces, gaps between slats less visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the slatted design and open structure of both top and shelf.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the tabletop and shelf as solid planes, with the wood grain and finish clearly visible.
